Case Study

Out of the Ashes
Women's Conference

Event Marketing Social Graphics Short-Form Video Print Design Landing Page
Client
Out of the Ashes International
Event
Women's Conference 2025
Location
Houston, TX
Overview

The Challenge

Out of the Ashes International needed a full content package to promote their annual women's conference — a multi-day event featuring keynote speakers, worship, and community gatherings across Houston. The goal was to drive awareness, build excitement, and move women to register before the October dates.

What We Built

Deliverables

🎨
Event Flier
Full-design print and digital flier featuring keynote speakers, event schedule, and venue details.
📱
Social Media Graphics
Branded graphics for Instagram and Facebook — speaker spotlights, countdowns, and event announcements.
🎬
Short-Form Video
An Instagram Reel edited to build hype and drive registrations in the lead-up to the conference.
🌐
Landing Page
A conference landing page designed to convert visitors into ticket buyers with clear event details and a call to action.
The Work

Assets

Event Flier
Social Media Graphics
Landing Page
Video

Short-Form Promo

Watch the Reel

A short-form promo edited for Instagram — designed to stop the scroll and move women to register.
